expected_effect: Improve one-sided arb defense without sacrificing the incumbent calm floor.
expected_failure_signature: If the regime switch flaps or both sides still move together, the branch will look like another over-spiky replay.
expected_win_condition: Charge the toxic side more selectively while preserving the incumbent calm baseline on the non-toxic side.
hidden_coupling_removed: One controller currently decides both when the book should become defensive and how one-sided toxicity should be charged.
rationale: Keep opportunity spend fixed, but let risk budgeting switch between a defensive symmetric regime and a one-sided hazard regime only when toxicity evidence aligns with side and extension.
title: Hazard-gated side regime
why_not_coefficient_retune: This introduces a risk-semantic regime switch rather than another additive overlay or cheap router.
